did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper used multiphoton microscopy (MPM) and optical coherence angiography (OCA) for imaging and feature extraction. Classification of equivocal lesions was performed using discriminant function analysis (a traditional statistical method), not AI, machine learning, or deep learning. The study explicitly states it is a clinical study validating optical imaging techniques.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
